findings.evidence: `rg -n "import TauCeti\.Basic|TauCeti\.Basic|\bhello\b|placeholder" code/TauCeti.lean code/TauCeti` has no hits after the deletion, while `roadmap/README.md` lists only mathematical roadmaps: Universal covers, Jacobian challenge, Reductive groups, PDE, Heegaard Floer, Multiquadratic, and Effective bounds.
findings.fix: Have a human add a roadmap entry covering this library-hygiene work, or leave the placeholder removal out of roadmap-gated Tau Ceti changes.
findings.issue: The PR removes the top-level placeholder module/API, but neither the description nor the roadmap identifies a target or prerequisite path for this repository cleanup.

summary: This is a single coherent cleanup, but it does not advance or provide a proximate prerequisite for any roadmap target.
